title: Savory Crumbly Peruvian Chicken Casserole
description: A hearty and savory Peruvian-inspired casserole featuring chicken, brandy, and pickles, perfect for a cozy dinner. This high-protein dish is made with wholesome ingredients and is suitable for a weeknight meal.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add onion, garlic, and aji amarillo pepper to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
In a large bowl, whisk together brandy, pickle juice, salt, and black pepper. Add the cooked chicken mixture and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, mix together shredded cheese and crushed crackers.
In a 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange half of the chicken mixture in the bottom of the dish. Top with half of the cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers, starting with the remaining chicken mixture, then the remaining cheese mixture.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
